channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-03 02:33 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Gavin Newsom doubled Medicaid spending, from $94 billion to $197B per year, while his state's popula...
item.description: Gavin Newsom doubled Medicaid spending, from $94 billion to $197B per year, while his state's population declined by 0.2 percent. It's not "services expanding" and "new programs being launched." It's just billions in fraud—and massive handouts to his union paymasters.

item.title: @elonmusk: Visual intelligence beyond the human paradigm
item.description: Visual intelligence beyond the human paradigm

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink’s high-speed internet is available in your area. Experience speeds up to 400+ Mbps to strea...
item.description: Starlink’s high-speed internet is available in your area. Experience speeds up to 400+ Mbps to stream your favorite shows and sports, work from home, browse social media and more.

item.title: @elonmusk: Inspiring new merch idea: rocket pocket underpants! 🚀 🩳 Underpants with a handy pocket for your rock...
item.description: Inspiring new merch idea: rocket pocket underpants! 🚀 🩳 Underpants with a handy pocket for your rocket, which contains a real scale model rocket with an easy pull out ability. Guaranteed to be a hit at parties!

item.title: @elonmusk: If you’ve even flown into Los Angeles, you understand how gorgeous and perfect Southern California i...
item.description: If you’ve even flown into Los Angeles, you understand how gorgeous and perfect Southern California is. It’s takes a superhuman effort to make that paradise a place where nobody wants to live or do business. But communists were up to the task.

item.title: @elonmusk: For anyone that thinks Tesla is sucking in EV sales… you should take a look at Q1 2026 pure EV deliv...
item.description: For anyone that thinks Tesla is sucking in EV sales… you should take a look at Q1 2026 pure EV deliveries of other companies: • Tesla: 358,023 (*official today*) • BYD: 310,389 • NIO: 83,465 • XPeng: 62,682 • GM: ~25,900 • Rivian: 10,365 • Ford: 6,860 • Lucid: ~4,985

item.title: @elonmusk: The ultimate California fraud has been hiding in plain sight Who got the money? Where is all the mon...
item.description: The ultimate California fraud has been hiding in plain sight Who got the money? Where is all the money?

item.title: @elonmusk: Small improvements to Imagine are happening frequently. Looks like we need another few weeks of trai...
item.description: Small improvements to Imagine are happening frequently. Looks like we need another few weeks of training for Imagine 2.0, which will have major upgrades in speech/audio and face/details consistency.

item.title: @elonmusk: Current release of Grok is much than beta 1, which beat Opus in this arena. We usually update the mo...
item.description: Current release of Grok is much than beta 1, which beat Opus in this arena. We usually update the model twice a week. Try the current version of Grok Heavy and you will be pleasantly surprised.

item.title: @elonmusk: New version of Grok app released
item.description: New version of Grok app released

item.title: @elonmusk: As sure as night follows day, the Golden State will eat its Golden Geese until there are no more lef...
item.description: As sure as night follows day, the Golden State will eat its Golden Geese until there are no more left. gg
